q.en: In what year did Mount Vesuvius erupt and bury Pompeii?
q.zh: 维苏威火山是在哪一年爆发并掩埋庞贝的？

explain.en: The book opens: 'Few people... cared about the earthquakes in AD 79' when Vesuvius erupted and buried Pompeii.
explain.zh: 书开头：“公元79年，几乎没人……在意那些地震”，维苏威爆发掩埋了庞贝。

q.en: Where do most of the world's volcanoes form?
q.zh: 世界上大多数火山形成在哪里？

options.en: In the middle of oceans only according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 只在海洋正中央（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: At the edges of Earth's plates, such as the Ring of Fire
options.zh: 在地球板块的边缘，如环太平洋火山带

explain.en: The book says: 'Most of the world's volcanoes are found where the plates meet' and names the Pacific 'Ring of Fire.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“世界上大多数火山位于板块相接处”，并点名太平洋的“火山带（Ring of Fire）”。

options.en: A place where hot magma sits unusually close to Earth's crust
options.zh: 岩浆异常接近地壳的地方

options.en: A very sunny beach according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一片阳光充足的海滩（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book describes Hawaii as above 'a "hot spot," a place where hot magma sits unusually close to Earth's crust.'
explain.zh: 书中把夏威夷描述为位于“热点——岩浆异常接近地壳之处”之上。

q.zh: 为什么复合型火山会爆发得那么猛烈？

options.en: They are struck by lightning according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它们被闪电击中（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Thick magma plugs the vent, building pressure until it explodes
options.zh: 黏稠的岩浆堵住火山口，压力积聚直到爆炸

explain.en: The book says thick magma 'can cool and harden before it reaches the surface, plugging a vent... the pressure builds. When the pressure becomes great enough, the volcano explodes.'
explain.zh: 书中说黏稠岩浆“在到达地表前冷却变硬，堵住火山口……压力积聚。足够大时火山便爆炸”。

q.en: What happened to Mount St. Helens in 1980?
q.zh: 1980年圣海伦斯火山发生了什么？

options.en: It turned into ice according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它变成了冰（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The entire northern side of the mountain was destroyed

explain.en: The book states: 'When Washington State's Mount St. Helens erupted in 1980, the entire northern side of the mountain was destroyed.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“1980年华盛顿州圣海伦斯火山爆发，山体整个北坡被摧毁。”

q.en: Which volcano is the tallest in the world from its base on the seafloor?
q.zh: 从海底基座算起，哪座火山是世界上最高的？

options.zh: 夏威夷的冒纳罗亚火山（Mauna Loa）

options.en: Mount Vesuvius according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 维苏威火山（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says Mauna Loa 'is the tallest volcano in the world, rising 9,170 meters from its base on the seafloor. That's taller than Mount Everest!'
explain.zh: 书中说冒纳罗亚“是世界上最高的火山，从海底基座升起9170米。比珠穆朗玛峰还高！”

options.en: A hill of light rocks (cinders) piled around a vent
options.zh: 由轻质岩石（火山渣）在火山口周围堆积成的小山

options.en: A lake inside a volcano according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 火山内部的一个湖（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says small lava chunks 'harden into light rocks called cinders. The cinders pile up around the vent into a hill... called cinder cones.'
explain.zh: 书中说小熔岩块“变硬成叫火山渣的轻岩石。火山渣在火山口周围堆积成小山……叫火山渣锥。”

options.en: A large bowl-shaped basin where land collapsed into an empty magma chamber
options.zh: 土地塌陷进空岩浆房后形成的大型碗状盆地

options.en: A type of lava fountain according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一种熔岩喷泉（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The glossary defines caldera as 'a large, bowl-shaped basin where the land has collapsed into an empty magma chamber.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 caldera 定义为“土地塌陷进空岩浆房后形成的大型碗状盆地”。

q.en: According to the glossary, what does 'dormant' mean for a volcano?
q.zh: 根据词汇表，火山的“dormant（休眠）”是什么意思？

options.en: Erupting right now according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 此刻正在喷发（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Quiet for many hundreds of years

explain.en: The glossary defines dormant as 'quiet for many hundreds of years.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 dormant 定义为“寂静了几百年”。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To explain how volcanoes form, where they occur, and the different types
options.zh: 解释火山如何形成、出现在何处，以及不同类型的火山

options.en: To tell a fictional story about a monster according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 讲述一个怪兽的虚构故事（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book is an informational text covering 'Where and Why Volcanoes Form' and the types of volcanoes.
explain.zh: 这是一本信息类读物，涵盖“火山在哪里及为何形成”以及各种火山类型。

prompt.en: Draw and label a cross-section of a volcano, showing the magma chamber, vent, crater, and one type (composite, shield, or cinder cone).
prompt.zh: 画一幅并标注火山剖面图，显示岩浆房、火山通道、火山口，并标出一种类型（复合型、盾形或火山渣锥）。

en: Use the book's diagrams of plates, vents, and magma chambers as a model.
Pick one volcano type and show its shape (steep vs. gentle).
zh: 以书中板块、火山通道和岩浆房的图示为参考。
选择一种火山类型，并画出它的形状（陡峭还是平缓）。
